thoth_3_1.question: "What disorder have I been allowing to stand?"

thoth_4_1.question: "Does this name carry weight — or is it empty sound?"

thoth_5_1.question: "Where did my word fail to stand?"

thoth_6_1.question: "Did I give in balance — or for recognition?"

thoth_7_1.question: "What leaves my mouth when I am not guarding it?"

thoth_8_1.question: "Does this feel like invention — or recognition?"

thoth_9_1.question: "Would someone else recognize this as alignment?"
